titlestmt.titleproper: Black books belonging to artist DOM-KOC8115

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-06-10 00:15:39 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Black books belonging to artist DOM-KOC

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Seven black books documenting different points in DOMS' long career, containing tags, fill-ins done in market, pen, paint pen, etc. with stickers, cut outs, and photographs glued in, and pages directly airbrushed. The books contain art by DOM and members of his Knock Out Crew, including associated writer DESA.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Black books belonging to artist DOM-KOC, #8115. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: DOMS-KOC is a Harlem based graffiti artist who has been active since the 1980s. He is most well known for his airbrush work, especially on T-shirts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains writing from DESA, DOMS KOC, KRT, SBC, Signifigant, RAVS, SWATCH, OJ, and JA. There is one example of a "wild style" piece and many tags, fill-ins, and throw-ups.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains writing from DOMS KOC and other members of Knock Out Crew and Fade (member of AA Mob)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains writing from DOMS KOC, SHARIF, UPTOWN, THOR, and other artists, mostly associated with KOC. Most of the works are either tags or fill-ins. There's also an old check inside for Cleopatra Riley, and the sleeve of a DVD titled VideoGraf Volume One. Many pages are laminated with packing tape. Includes airbrushed foldout page with names of everyone in the Knock Out Crew.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains writing and numerous stickers from NARC, BGA, SPLIT and many other writers. This black book is elaborate, some pieces take up multiple pages and utilize cut outs, name and postal stickers, etc. to create multi-media work. The pieces in this book also tend to be very vibrant. Contains airbrush, paint, marker, pen, etc. This black book is unusual because of the way the artists worked with form, it is very different from the other black books in DOMS' collection and shows the trajectory of his crew. An emphasis is on airbrushed works here. One page is dated 2007, and because of the style represented in this book compared to the 1990s "KOC style" it is fair to say most of it is from the mid-2000s.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains work by FADE, STEM, DOA, USED, MOM, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains writing from DOMS, AR21, Leilani, Stalkers, Duez and many other artists. There are some drawings, photographs, stickers included inside as well as tags and fill-ins.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Joker, Chem, GSTOCK, PREMER, and TOYZ.
